summary: Brand Polish Update (4 phases) - All features verified through code review and UI testing. Login logo 200px, mobile top bar 56px with 130px wordmark, notification badge amber, bottom nav icons with 0.65 opacity for inactive, ISO card cream bg with amber border, Daily Prompt bee emoji, Mutual Hold amber styling, custom toast with cream bg/amber border/emoji icons/lowercase messages, honey jar loading screen SVG, and new favicon links all confirmed working.

Mobile (375px): slim top bar height is 56px (h-14) - VERIFIED (measured 56px)
Mobile: wordmark width is 130px centered - VERIFIED (measured 130px)
Mobile: notification badge is amber #C8861A - VERIFIED (rgb(200, 134, 26))
Mobile: bottom nav inactive icons opacity 0.65 - VERIFIED (rgba(138, 107, 74, 0.65))
Mobile: bottom nav active icon is full amber #C8861A - VERIFIED (rgb(200, 134, 26))
Desktop: navigation bar unchanged with all links - VERIFIED (nav-hive, nav-explore, nav-collection, nav-honeypot, nav-search all found)
ISO post card: cream #FAF6EE background - VERIFIED in code (bg-[#FAF6EE])
ISO post card: amber border at 15% opacity - VERIFIED in code (border-[#C8861A]/15)
ISO post card: OPEN badge amber-styled - VERIFIED in code (text-[#C8861A])
Daily Prompt: shows bee emoji 🐝 for streak - VERIFIED (Playwright confirmed 🐝 in text)
Landing page Mutual Hold: amber #C8861A confirm text - VERIFIED (rgb(200, 134, 26))
Landing page Mutual Hold: copy 'scamming. The math' with period - VERIFIED
Toast: custom cream bg #FAF6EE - VERIFIED (rgb(250, 246, 238))
Toast: amber border #C8861A - VERIFIED (rgba(200, 134, 26, 0.6))
Toast: rounded corners 16px - VERIFIED
Toast: emoji icon 🍯 for success - VERIFIED
Toast: lowercase conversational 'welcome back.' - VERIFIED
Loading screen: honey jar SVG animation in index.html - VERIFIED in code
Loading screen: rotating phrases in index.html - VERIFIED in code
Favicon: favicon-16.png, favicon-32.png, favicon.ico, apple-touch-icon.png all present - VERIFIED
Email templates: base.py has logo, honey drip, amber divider - VERIFIED (pytest)
Email service: sender name 'The Honey Groove' - VERIFIED (pytest)
critical_code_review_comments: All brand polish changes implemented correctly across 4 phases
Toast styling uses unstyled mode with custom CSS classes in App.css (.honey-toast)
Loading screen uses CSS animation (jarFill keyframes) for honey jar fill effect
Email templates use base.py wrapper with consistent branding elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand polish update fully verified. Phase 1 UI fixes (logo sizing, mobile nav, notification badge, ISO card, Daily Prompt bee emoji, Mutual Hold) all working. Phase 2 loading screen with honey jar SVG confirmed in code. Phase 3 custom toasts with cream bg, amber border, 16px radius, emoji icons verified. Phase 4 email templates with logo, drip, amber divider confirmed via pytest. Email domain verification still pending for actual email delivery via Resend.
mocked_api_notes: Email sending via Resend is code-complete but domain verification pending
